creator: diizzy@FreeBSD.org
text:
We have around 280 ports that uses it and about ~30 that uses on the fly generated archives using Gitlab instances/services. It would be nice if we could convert all these to USE_GITLAB and do a simple line change once https://bugs.freebsd.org/bugzilla/show_bug.cgi?id=248967 is fixed rather than doing more detective work later on and as I mentioned before for consistency. I agree that distfile name isn't ideal but it will make further improvements less tedious.

fwiw, I've either converted most already and/or sent a patch for each port that have a maintainer listed about this.
